title: Obione paludosa

intro: Obione paludosa, also known as Saltwort or Glasswort, is a halophytic perennial plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including rheumatism and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Obione paludosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
